testcase.name: triggerRun: creates run and M1 audit log
testcase.failure: failed running before hook

[Error [ERR_TEST_FAILURE]: failed running before hook] { code: 'ERR_TEST_FAILURE', failureType: 'hookFailed', cause: { code: 'SQLITE_ERROR', query: "INSERT INTO tank_reconciliation_TankConfiguration (tankId,tankName,materialId,plant,toleranceOkPct,toleranceFlagPct,atgEndpoint,active,terminalId,terminalName) SELECT value->>'$[0]',value->>'$[1]',value->>'$[2]',value->>'$[3]',value->>'$[4]',value->>'$[5]',value->>'$[6]',value->>'$[7]',value->>'$[8]',value->>'$[9]' FROM json_each(?)" } }
